name: claude-project-bootstrap
description: Bootstrap a new repo with the working-agreements + GitHub Project + CLAUDE.md hub-and-spokes setup

plugins.name: claude-project-bootstrap
plugins.description: Lay down working-agreements.md, roadmap.md, CLAUDE.md hub+spokes, and a GitHub Project (v2) with custom fields and labels — one command per new repo.

plugins.name: engineering-craft
plugins.description: Engineering craft skills — diagnose, tdd, prototype, zoom-out, grill-with-docs, improve-codebase-architecture, to-issues, to-prd — adapted from mattpocock/skills (MIT) to the bootstrap conventions and the AFK/HITL model. Enabled permanently (ongoing craft), separate from the one-time setup plugin.
